error.message: File does not end with a newline.
First sentence should end with a period.
Method 'handleKind' is not designed for extension - needs to be abstract, final or empty.
Method 'isManaged' is not designed for extension - needs to be abstract, final or empty.
Method 'renew' is not designed for extension - needs to be abstract, final or empty.
'+' should be on a new line.
'+' should be on a new line.
Method 'cancel' is not designed for extension - needs to be abstract, final or empty.
Variable 'delegationTokenRenewer' must be private and have accessor methods.
Method 'setUp' is not designed for extension - needs to be abstract, final or empty.
Method 'tearDown' is not designed for extension - needs to be abstract, final or empty.
Variable 'status' must be private and have accessor methods.
'{' at column 33 should have line break after.
'{' at column 31 should have line break after.
First sentence should end with a period.
Method 'testDTRenewal' is not designed for extension - needs to be abstract, final or empty.
'+' should be on a new line.
